name: agentic-smart-care-scheduler
description: Cloud-native multi-agent AI orchestration for healthcare appointment coordination

scripts.install:ui: npm run install:customer && npm run install:admin
scripts.install:analytics: conda run -n smartcare-analytics python -m pip install -r DataManagement/requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:ui && npm run install:analytics
scripts.build:customer: cd app-web/src/main/frontend/customer-portal && ng build --base-href /portal/customer/ && cp -r dist/customer-portal/browser/* ../../resources/static/portal/customer/
scripts.build:admin: cd app-web/src/main/frontend/admin-portal && ng build --base-href /portal/admin/ && cp -r dist/admin-portal/browser/* ../../resources/static/portal/admin/
scripts.build:ui: npm run build:customer && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:all: npm run build:ui && npm run build:java
scripts.start: npm run build:ui && mvn install -DskipTests && concurrently "npm run start:spring" "npm run start:broker"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:spring" "npm run start:ui:customer" "npm run start:ui:admin"
scripts.test:analytics: conda run -n smartcare-analytics python -m pytest DataManagement/
scripts.test:all: npm run test:java && npm run test:analytics
scripts.analytics:run-all: npm run analytics:train && npm run analytics:context
scripts.lint:ui: npm run lint:customer && npm run lint:admin
scripts.clean: npm run clean:java && npm run clean:ui
scripts.all: npm run install:all && npm run build:all && npm run test:all
